001// Copyright (c) Choreo contributors
002
003package choreo.auto;
004
005import choreo.Choreo;
006import choreo.Choreo.TrajectoryCache;
007import choreo.Choreo.TrajectoryLogger;
008import choreo.trajectory.SwerveSample;
009import choreo.trajectory.Trajectory;
010import choreo.trajectory.TrajectorySample;
011import edu.wpi.first.hal.FRCNetComm.tResourceType;
012import edu.wpi.first.hal.HAL;
013import edu.wpi.first.math.geometry.Pose2d;
014import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj.DriverStation;
015import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj.DriverStation.Alliance;
016import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj.RobotBase;
017import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj.event.EventLoop;
018import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.Command;
019import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.Commands;
020import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.Subsystem;
021import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.button.Trigger;
022import java.util.HashMap;
023import java.util.List;
024import java.util.Optional;
025import java.util.function.BooleanSupplier;
026import java.util.function.Consumer;
027import java.util.function.Supplier;
028
029/**
030 * A factory used to create {@link AutoRoutine}s and {@link AutoTrajectory}s.
031 *
032 * @see <a href="https://choreo.autos/choreolib/auto-routines">Auto Routine Docs</a>
033 */
034public class AutoFactory {
035  static final AutoRoutine VOID_ROUTINE =
036      new AutoRoutine(null, "VOID-ROUTINE", new EventLoop()) {
037        @Override
038        public Command cmd() {
039          return Commands.none().withName("VoidAutoRoutine");
040        }
041
042        @Override
043        public Command cmd(BooleanSupplier _finishCondition) {
044          return cmd();
045        }
046
047        @Override
048        public void poll() {}
049
050        @Override
051        public void reset() {}
052
053        @Override
054        public Trigger running() {
055          return new Trigger(loop, () -> false);
056        }
057      };
058
059  /** A class used to bind commands to events in all trajectories created by this factory. */
060  public static class AutoBindings {
061    private HashMap<String, Command> bindings = new HashMap<>();
062
063    /** Default constructor. */
064    public AutoBindings() {}
065
066    /**
067     * Binds a command to an event in all trajectories created by the factory using this bindings.
068     *
069     * @param name The name of the event to bind the command to.
070     * @param cmd The command to bind to the event.
071     * @return The bindings object for chaining.
072     */
073    public AutoBindings bind(String name, Command cmd) {
074      bindings.put(name, cmd);
075      return this;
076    }
077
078    private void merge(AutoBindings other) {
079      if (other == null) {
080        return;
081      }
082      bindings.putAll(other.bindings);
083    }
084
085    /**
086     * Gets the bindings map.
087     *
088     * @return The bindings map.
089     */
090    HashMap<String, Command> getBindings() {
091      return bindings;
092    }
093  }
094
095  private final TrajectoryCache trajectoryCache = new TrajectoryCache();
096  private final Supplier<Pose2d> poseSupplier;
097  private final Consumer<Pose2d> resetOdometry;
098  private final Consumer<? extends TrajectorySample<?>> controller;
099  private final Supplier<Optional<Alliance>> alliance;
100  private final BooleanSupplier useAllianceFlipping;
101  private final Subsystem driveSubsystem;
102  private final AutoBindings bindings = new AutoBindings();
103  private final Optional<TrajectoryLogger<? extends TrajectorySample<?>>> trajectoryLogger;
104
105  /**
106   * It is recommended to use the {@link Choreo#createAutoFactory} to create a new instance of this
107   * class.
108   *
109   * @param <SampleType> {@link Choreo#createAutoFactory}
110   * @param poseSupplier {@link Choreo#createAutoFactory}
111   * @param resetOdometry {@link Choreo#createAutoFactory}
112   * @param controller {@link Choreo#createAutoFactory}
113   * @param driveSubsystem {@link Choreo#createAutoFactory}
114   * @param useAllianceFlipping {@link Choreo#createAutoFactory}
115   * @param bindings {@link Choreo#createAutoFactory}
116   * @param trajectoryLogger {@link Choreo#createAutoFactory}
117   * @param alliance {@link Choreo#createAutoFactory}
118   */
119  public <SampleType extends TrajectorySample<SampleType>> AutoFactory(
120      Supplier<Pose2d> poseSupplier,
121      Consumer<Pose2d> resetOdometry,
122      Consumer<SampleType> controller,
123      Subsystem driveSubsystem,
124      BooleanSupplier useAllianceFlipping,
125      AutoBindings bindings,
126      Optional<TrajectoryLogger<SampleType>> trajectoryLogger,
127      Supplier<Optional<Alliance>> alliance) {
128    this.poseSupplier = poseSupplier;
129    this.resetOdometry = resetOdometry;
130    this.controller = controller;
131    this.driveSubsystem = driveSubsystem;
132    this.useAllianceFlipping = useAllianceFlipping;
133    this.bindings.merge(bindings);
134    this.trajectoryLogger =
135        trajectoryLogger.map(logger -> (TrajectoryLogger<? extends TrajectorySample<?>>) logger);
136    this.alliance = alliance;
137    HAL.report(tResourceType.kResourceType_ChoreoTrigger, 1);
138  }
139
140  /**
141   * It is recommended to use the {@link Choreo#createAutoFactory} to create a new instance of this
142   * class.
143   *
144   * @param <SampleType> {@link Choreo#createAutoFactory}
145   * @param poseSupplier {@link Choreo#createAutoFactory}
146   * @param resetOdometry {@link Choreo#createAutoFactory}
147   * @param controller {@link Choreo#createAutoFactory}
148   * @param driveSubsystem {@link Choreo#createAutoFactory}
149   * @param useAllianceFlipping {@link Choreo#createAutoFactory}
150   * @param bindings {@link Choreo#createAutoFactory}
151   * @param trajectoryLogger {@link Choreo#createAutoFactory}
152   */
153  public <SampleType extends TrajectorySample<SampleType>> AutoFactory(
154      Supplier<Pose2d> poseSupplier,
155      Consumer<Pose2d> resetOdometry,
156      Consumer<SampleType> controller,
157      Subsystem driveSubsystem,
158      BooleanSupplier useAllianceFlipping,
159      AutoBindings bindings,
160      Optional<TrajectoryLogger<SampleType>> trajectoryLogger) {
161    this(
162        poseSupplier,
163        resetOdometry,
164        controller,
165        driveSubsystem,
166        useAllianceFlipping,
167        bindings,
168        trajectoryLogger,
169        DriverStation::getAlliance);
170  }
171
172  /**
173   * Creates a new {@link AutoRoutine}.
174   *
175   * @param name The name of the {@link AutoRoutine}.
176   * @return A new {@link AutoRoutine}.
177   */
178  public AutoRoutine newRoutine(String name) {
179    // Clear cache in simulation to allow a form of "hot-reloading" trajectories
180    if (RobotBase.isSimulation()) {
181      trajectoryCache.clear();
182    }
183
184    return new AutoRoutine(this, name, this::allianceKnownOrIgnored);
185  }
186
187  private boolean allianceKnownOrIgnored() {
188    return !useAllianceFlipping.getAsBoolean() || alliance.get().isPresent();
189  }
190
191  /**
192   * A package protected method to create a new {@link AutoTrajectory} to be used in an {@link
193   * AutoRoutine}.
194   *
195   * @see AutoRoutine#trajectory(String)
196   */
197  AutoTrajectory trajectory(String trajectoryName, AutoRoutine routine) {
198    Optional<? extends Trajectory<?>> optTrajectory =
199        trajectoryCache.loadTrajectory(trajectoryName);
200    Trajectory<?> trajectory;
201    if (optTrajectory.isPresent()) {
202      trajectory = optTrajectory.get();
203    } else {
204      DriverStation.reportError("Could not load trajectory: " + trajectoryName, false);
205      trajectory = new Trajectory<SwerveSample>(trajectoryName, List.of(), List.of(), List.of());
206    }
207    return trajectory(trajectory, routine);
208  }
209
210  /**
211   * A package protected method to create a new {@link AutoTrajectory} to be used in an {@link
212   * AutoRoutine}.
213   *
214   * @see AutoRoutine#trajectory(String, int)
215   */
216  AutoTrajectory trajectory(String trajectoryName, final int splitIndex, AutoRoutine routine) {
217    Optional<? extends Trajectory<?>> optTrajectory =
218        trajectoryCache.loadTrajectory(trajectoryName, splitIndex);
219    Trajectory<?> trajectory;
220    if (optTrajectory.isPresent()) {
221      trajectory = optTrajectory.get();
222    } else {
223      DriverStation.reportError("Could not load trajectory: " + trajectoryName, false);
224      trajectory = new Trajectory<SwerveSample>(trajectoryName, List.of(), List.of(), List.of());
225    }
226    return trajectory(trajectory, routine);
227  }
228
229  /**
230   * A package protected method to create a new {@link AutoTrajectory} to be used in an {@link
231   * AutoRoutine}.
232   *
233   * @see AutoRoutine#trajectory(Trajectory)
234   */
235  @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
236  <ST extends TrajectorySample<ST>> AutoTrajectory trajectory(
237      Trajectory<ST> trajectory, AutoRoutine routine) {
238    // type solidify everything
239    final Trajectory<ST> solidTrajectory = trajectory;
240    final Consumer<ST> solidController = (Consumer<ST>) this.controller;
241    final Optional<TrajectoryLogger<ST>> solidLogger =
242        this.trajectoryLogger.map(logger -> (TrajectoryLogger<ST>) logger);
243    return new AutoTrajectory(
244        trajectory.name(),
245        solidTrajectory,
246        poseSupplier,
247        resetOdometry,
248        solidController,
249        useAllianceFlipping,
250        alliance,
251        solidLogger,
252        driveSubsystem,
253        routine,
254        bindings);
255  }
256
257  /**
258   * Creates a new {@link AutoTrajectory} command to be used in an auto routine.
259   *
260   * <p><b>Important </b>
261   *
262   * <p>{@link #trajectoryCommand} and {@link #trajectory} methods should not be mixed in the same
263   * auto routine. {@link #trajectoryCommand} is used as an escape hatch for teams that don't need
264   * the benefits of the {@link #trajectory} method and its {@link Trigger} API. {@link
265   * #trajectoryCommand} does not invoke bindings added via calling {@link #bind} or {@link
266   * AutoBindings} passed into the factory constructor.
267   *
268   * @param trajectoryName The name of the trajectory to use.
269   * @return A new {@link AutoTrajectory}.
270   */
271  public Command trajectoryCommand(String trajectoryName) {
272    return trajectory(trajectoryName, VOID_ROUTINE).cmd();
273  }
274
275  /**
276   * Creates a new {@link AutoTrajectory} command to be used in an auto routine.
277   *
278   * <p><b>Important </b>
279   *
280   * <p>{@link #trajectoryCommand} and {@link #trajectory} methods should not be mixed in the same
281   * auto routine. {@link #trajectoryCommand} is used as an escape hatch for teams that don't need
282   * the benefits of the {@link #trajectory} method and its {@link Trigger} API. {@link
283   * #trajectoryCommand} does not invoke bindings added via calling {@link #bind} or {@link
284   * AutoBindings} passed into the factory constructor.
285   *
286   * @param trajectoryName The name of the trajectory to use.
287   * @param splitIndex The index of the split trajectory to use.
288   * @return A new {@link AutoTrajectory}.
289   */
290  public Command trajectoryCommand(String trajectoryName, final int splitIndex) {
291    return trajectory(trajectoryName, splitIndex, VOID_ROUTINE).cmd();
292  }
293
294  /**
295   * Creates a new {@link AutoTrajectory} command to be used in an auto routine.
296   *
297   * <p><b>Important </b>
298   *
299   * <p>{@link #trajectoryCommand} and {@link #trajectory} methods should not be mixed in the same
300   * auto routine. {@link #trajectoryCommand} is used as an escape hatch for teams that don't need
301   * the benefits of the {@link #trajectory} method and its {@link Trigger} API. {@link
302   * #trajectoryCommand} does not invoke bindings added via calling {@link #bind} or {@link
303   * AutoBindings} passed into the factory constructor.
304   *
305   * @param <SampleType> The type of the trajectory samples.
306   * @param trajectory The trajectory to use.
307   * @return A new {@link AutoTrajectory}.
308   */
309  public <SampleType extends TrajectorySample<SampleType>> Command trajectoryCommand(
310      Trajectory<SampleType> trajectory) {
311    return trajectory(trajectory, VOID_ROUTINE).cmd();
312  }
313
314  /**
315   * Creates a command that resets the robot's odometry to the start of a trajectory.
316   *
317   * @param trajectoryName The name of the trajectory to use.
318   * @return A command that resets the robot's odometry.
319   */
320  public Command resetOdometry(String trajectoryName) {
321    return trajectory(trajectoryName, VOID_ROUTINE).resetOdometry();
322  }
323
324  /**
325   * Creates a command that resets the robot's odometry to the start of a trajectory.
326   *
327   * @param trajectoryName The name of the trajectory to use.
328   * @param splitIndex The index of the split trajectory to use.
329   * @return A command that resets the robot's odometry.
330   */
331  public Command resetOdometry(String trajectoryName, final int splitIndex) {
332    return trajectory(trajectoryName, splitIndex, VOID_ROUTINE).resetOdometry();
333  }
334
335  /**
336   * Creates a command that resets the robot's odometry to the start of a trajectory.
337   *
338   * @param <SampleType> The type of the trajectory samples.
339   * @param trajectory The trajectory to use.
340   * @return A command that resets the robot's odometry.
341   */
342  public <SampleType extends TrajectorySample<SampleType>> Command resetOdometry(
343      Trajectory<SampleType> trajectory) {
344    return trajectory(trajectory, VOID_ROUTINE).resetOdometry();
345  }
346
347  /**
348   * Creates an {@link AutoRoutine} with the name of the command. The command is the bound to the
349   * routine's enabled trigger. This is useful for adding a {@link Command} composition based auto
350   * to the {@link choreo.auto.AutoChooser}.
351   *
352   * @param cmd The command to bind to the routine.
353   * @return A new auto routine.
354   */
355  public AutoRoutine commandAsAutoRoutine(Command cmd) {
356    AutoRoutine routine = newRoutine(cmd.getName());
357    routine.running().onTrue(cmd);
358    return routine;
359  }
360
361  /**
362   * Binds a command to an event in all trajectories created after this point.
363   *
364   * @param name The name of the trajectory to bind the command to.
365   * @param cmd The command to bind to the trajectory.
366   */
367  public void bind(String name, Command cmd) {
368    bindings.bind(name, cmd);
369  }
370
371  /**
372   * The {@link AutoFactory} caches trajectories with a {@link TrajectoryCache} to avoid reloading
373   * the same trajectory multiple times.
374   *
375   * @return The trajectory cache.
376   */
377  public TrajectoryCache cache() {
378    return trajectoryCache;
379  }
380}
